movesList.name: b -- n -- f
inputs: Walk Back / Block        Neutral       Walk Forward

movesList.name: Mid-Air Block
inputs: Hold b / db when attacked while in air

movesList.name: Dash Tackle
inputs: Press P while dashing or running

movesList.name: Dash Slide
inputs: Press LK while dashing or running

movesList.name: Dash Jump Kick
inputs: Press HK while dashing or running

movesList.name: Get Up
inputs: While getting up, tap b / f / d / u

movesList.name: Get Up Attack
inputs: While getting up, press P / K

movesList.name: Defensive Fall
inputs: Press any attack button while falling

movesList.name: Attack Cancel
inputs: Attack your foe as they attack you

movesList.name: Three Kick Chain
inputs: b + HK, b + HK, b + HK

movesList.name: Four Kick Chain
inputs: b + HK, b + HK, HK, b / f + HK
